analysis.root_cause: The agent failed to perform the horizontal flip required to interpret the mirror image correctly and did not perform the time calculation.
The agent failed to correctly interpret the mirrored clock face and perform the subsequent arithmetic, likely due to confusion between mirror-image reading and standard clock reading.
The agent consistently misinterprets the mirrored clock face, failing to correctly map the mirrored hand positions to standard clock coordinates.
The agent correctly flipped the image but misread the time from the flipped clock (it read 7:10 instead of 4:10) and performed incorrect arithmetic.
The agent correctly flipped the image to 4:10, but misread the time as 7:10 and performed incorrect arithmetic.
The agent incorrectly read the mirror-flipped clock. The hour hand is between 4 and 5 (closer to 4), and the minute hand is at 10, making the time 4:10, not 7:10.
